---
title: "debt_viz.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debt_viz.py"
loc: 137
complexity: 16
logic_score: 1.98
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 5.49
overall_score: 2.39
---

## Intent
The `debt_viz.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, log, DebtAnalyzer, __init__, _get_python_files, analyze, render_json, render_dashboard, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, log, DebtAnalyzer, __init__, _get_python_files, analyze, render_json, render_dashboard, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [scripts.ui](file://scripts.ui)
- [radon.complexity](file://radon.complexity)
- [radon.visitors](file://radon.visitors)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_separator`
- `box_bottom`
- `log`
- `DebtAnalyzer`
- `__init__`
- `_get_python_files`
- `analyze`
- `render_json`
- `render_dashboard`
- `main`
